name: Cobot API
description:
The Cobot API is a RESTful API for managing coworking spaces. It provides access to spaces, memberships, bookings, and more. Authentication uses OAuth 2.0 with defined scopes.

**Base URL:** `https://{subdomain}.cobot.me/api`

**Authentication:** OAuth 2.0. Public endpoints require no auth. Private endpoints require OAuth2 token with appropriate scope.

**Rate Limit:** 60 requests/minute per user (some endpoints may differ).
